title: nepeta koejeana
intro: Nepeta koejeana, also known as catmint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, such as nepetalactone and luteolin. The health benefits of Nepeta koejeana include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
